children.text: to complete appraisals and satisfy other legal requirements for the sale or exchange of public land identified for disposal under approved land use plans under ;section 1712 of this title

not later than 180 days after , to establish and make available to the public, on the website of the Department of the Interior, a database containing a comprehensive list of all the land referred to in paragraph (1); andMarch 23, 2018
to maintain the database referred to in paragraph (2).

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The sale of public land so identified shall be conducted in accordance with sections 1713 and 1719 of this title.

children.heading: Exceptions to competitive bidding requirements
children.label: 2 Exceptions to competitive bidding requirements
children.text: The exceptions to competitive bidding requirements under shall apply to this section in cases in which the Secretary determines it to be necessary.section 1713(f) of this title

children.heading: Report in Public Land Statistics
children.label: c Report in Public Land Statistics
children.text: The Secretary shall provide in the annual publication of Public Land Statistics, a report of activities under this section.
